name: codex-agent-loop
description: Bounded, resumable OpenAI-native coding loops for Codex using shell and apply_patch tools.

interface.shortDescription: Run bounded Claude-Code-style coding loops with shell, patches, turn caps, and approval pauses.
interface.longDescription: Codex Agent Loop adds a reusable command and skill for running bounded, resumable OpenAI-native coding loops. It drives shell and apply_patch tool calls through the Responses API, stores local run logs, and can pause before write actions so you can review and resume.
defaultPrompt: Run an agent loop on this coding task with an 8-turn cap.
Iterate until the bug is fixed, but pause before write actions.
Resume the last paused coding loop and approve the pending patch.
